How to Play

Enter a 4 digit key and press Enter or press/click Try. Digits allowed are in the range: 0 to 9. The secret key may contain repeated digits e.g.1123.

Your guess will be displayed alongside a feedback:

⚪ is a correct digit in the correct place;

🔴 is a correct digit incorrectly placed;

❌ is an incorrect digit.

The order of the symbols in feedback does not relate to the order of the digits in your guess. ⚪ if any, will always be displayed first, 🔴 if any, will be displayed second, and ❌ last. E.g. For Secret Key: 9981, Guess: 8881 would give Feedback: ⚪⚪❌❌.

The Story

Drake guards the entrance to the Enchanted Realm where all the dragons' riches lie.

Guess the 4 digit key in 10 tries or less, and he'll let you pass.

Fail, and...well, better not fail...

You, Fool!

Fear not Drake, but your ignorance...

Rid it, and you shall pass!

Welcome to the Enchanted Realm!

Your WISDOM is the gate opener,

Your COURAGE, the dragon tamer,

Your TRUE HEART, the light kindler!

THEY are your riches, the treasure is yours!

Your guesses and feedback will be displayed here.

Enter guess here

10 tries
